detailed_comparison.english_reference: Walk past the sofa, go through the archway and upstairs to the bedroom window.

machine_translation.instruction: 走过沙发，穿过拱门，再上楼到卧室窗户那儿。

llm_generated.instruction: 从前台旁边直走，路过电视和镜子，大概八米后看到楼梯，直接走上去就到了。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: Turn left and walk down the hallway, passing the bathroom on your right. Stop at the end of the corridor.

machine_translation.instruction: 左转，顺着走廊往前走，经过右手边的卫生间，走到走廊尽头停下。

llm_generated.instruction: 从前台旁边直走，经过电视和镜子那边，再走几步碰到楼梯，顺着往上走就到顶了。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: Go straight through the kitchen, turn right at the refrigerator, and walk to the back door.

machine_translation.instruction: 穿过厨房直走，到冰箱那儿往右拐，再走到后门。

llm_generated.instruction: 离开前台直走，穿过电视和镜子那儿，大概八米远就是楼梯，直接走到顶部就行。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: From the lobby, take the elevator to the second floor, turn left and walk down the hall to room 205.

machine_translation.instruction: 从大堂坐电梯上二楼，左转后顺着走廊走，就到 205 房间了。

llm_generated.instruction: 从入口进来直走，路过茶几和床头柜，看到浴缸后往右转，再走几步就到沙发前啦。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: Walk past the dining table, go through the sliding glass door and out to the patio.

machine_translation.instruction: 走过餐桌，穿过玻璃推拉门，走到外面的露台。

llm_generated.instruction: 进来顺着道一直走，经过茶几和床头柜，看见浴缸往右拐，没多远前面就是沙发了。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: From the reception desk, go straight past the conference room on your left. The office is at the end of the hallway.

machine_translation.instruction: 从前台直走，经过左手边的会议室，办公室就在走廊尽头。

llm_generated.instruction: 进门直走大概二十米，经过茶几和床头柜，浴缸旁边右转，走到头就是沙发前了。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: Climb the stairs, turn right at the top, and enter the master bedroom. Stop in front of the closet.

machine_translation.instruction: 走上楼梯，到顶后右转，进入主卧，停在衣柜前。

llm_generated.instruction: 从电梯口出来直走，路过车库和厨房后左转，瞧见书架再往前几步，沙发就到了。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: Walk through the living room, past the fireplace, and out the French doors to the garden.

machine_translation.instruction: 穿过客厅，经过壁炉，从法式门出去就到花园了。

llm_generated.instruction: 电梯口出来一直走，经过车库和厨房后拐个弯，看到书架别停，再迈几步就到沙发前啦。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: From the elevator, turn left and walk past the ice machine. The vending area is on your right.

machine_translation.instruction: 出了电梯往左转，走过制冰机，自动售货区就在你右手边。

llm_generated.instruction: 电梯出来直走，穿过车库到厨房右转，顺着书架方向挪几步，立马就能看见沙发了。

detailed_comparison.english_reference: Go down the stairs, turn left at the bottom, and walk straight to the garage door.

machine_translation.instruction: 下楼，到底左转，然后直走到车库门。

llm_generated.instruction: 从玄关直走经过柜子和门，穿过拱门看到冰箱后往浴缸方向拐，再走几步就到床尾啦。
